title: AWS CloudFormation Stack
description: Represents an AWS CloudFormation stack, which is a collection of AWS resources that you can manage as a single unit. A stack is created from a CloudFormation template and provisions the defined resources in the correct order based on dependency relationships.

StackId.description: Unique identifier of the stack, formatted as an Amazon Resource Name (ARN).

StackName.description: The name associated with the stack. Must be unique within a region.

ChangeSetId.description: The unique ID of the change set associated with this stack.

Description.description: A user-defined description associated with the stack.

CreationTime.description: The time at which the stack was created.

DeletionTime.description: The time the stack was deleted.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The time the stack was last updated. This field is only returned if the stack has been updated at least once.

StackStatusReason.description: Success or failure message associated with the stack status.

DisableRollback.description: Boolean to enable or disable rollback on stack creation failures.

NotificationARNs.description: Amazon SNS topic ARNs to which stack related events are published.

TimeoutInMinutes.description: The amount of time within which stack creation should complete.

Capabilities.description: The capabilities allowed in the stack.

Outputs.description: A list of output structures containing stack outputs.

RoleARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that CloudFormation assumes to create the stack.

Tags.description: A list of tags associated with this stack.

EnableTerminationProtection.description: Whether termination protection is enabled for the stack.

ParentId.description: For nested stacks, the stack ID of the direct parent of this stack.

RootId.description: For nested stacks, the stack ID of the top-level stack to which this stack belongs.

DeletionMode.description: Specifies the deletion mode for the stack.

DetailedStatus.description: The detailed status of the resource or stack.

RetainExceptOnCreate.description: When true, newly created resources are deleted when the operation rolls back.

Output.description: An output value from a CloudFormation stack.

OutputKey.description: The key associated with the output.

OutputValue.description: The value associated with the output.

ExportName.description: The name of the export associated with this output for cross-stack references.

Tag.description: A key-value pair used to tag the stack.

Parameter.description: An input parameter for the stack.

ParameterKey.description: The key associated with the parameter.

ParameterValue.description: The input value associated with the parameter.

UsePreviousValue.description: During a stack update, use the existing parameter value.

ResolvedValue.description: Read-only. The value that corresponds to an SSM parameter key.

RollbackConfiguration.description: Monitoring and rollback configuration for the stack.

RollbackTriggers.description: The triggers to monitor during stack creation or update actions.

Arn.description: The ARN of the rollback trigger (must be a CloudWatch alarm).

Type.description: The resource type of the rollback trigger.

MonitoringTimeInMinutes.description: The amount of time in minutes to monitor after stack deployment.

StackDriftInformation.description: Contains information about whether the stack's actual configuration differs from its expected configuration.

StackDriftStatus.description: Status of the stack's actual configuration compared to its expected template configuration.

LastCheckTimestamp.description: Most recent time when a drift detection operation was initiated.
